name: Dialogflow
tagline: Detect intents and manage conversational agents
description: Send end-user expressions to a Dialogflow ES agent and receive matched intents, parameters, actions, and configured responses. Requires a Google Cloud project, the Dialogflow API, IAM permissions, and an OAuth access token.

auth.hint: Authenticate with a Google OAuth access token from Application Default Credentials, a service account, or gcloud. The caller needs appropriate Dialogflow IAM roles and cloud-platform or dialogflow scope.

tools.name: detect_intent
tools.description: Send one conversational turn to a Dialogflow ES agent and return the matched intent, extracted parameters, action, and fulfillment response.

params.name: project_id
params.description: Google Cloud project containing the Dialogflow ES agent.

params.name: session_id
params.description: Caller-generated conversation session ID, at most 36 bytes; do not reuse concurrently.

params.name: query_input
params.description: Dialogflow query input, such as a text object containing text and language_code.

params.name: x-goog-user-project
params.description: Quota/billing project used by Google REST examples when authenticating with user credentials.

tools.name: list_intents
tools.description: List intents configured for the Dialogflow ES agent in a Google Cloud project.

params.name: project_id
params.description: Google Cloud project containing the Dialogflow ES agent.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum intents to return; confirm current limits in the endpoint reference.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token from a previous list response.
